economic_notes: Nation has extensive business enterprise portfolio including forestry, oil and gas services, wind energy, reclamation, communications, fuel cardlock, and industrial supply. Settlement trust funds of $11,085,194 held by Royal Trust Corporation not included in financial statements. COVID-19 note included as subsequent event.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Prior year (2020) audit was qualified by another auditor due to inability to obtain sufficient evidence on Nikanese Wah Tzee Stewardship Society and 4 Evergreen Resources LP. Current year audit is unqualified. Nation has 24 GBEs recorded on modified equity basis contributing $4,163,219 income. Two entities proportionately consolidated: Nikanese Wah Tzee Stewardship Society (50%) and 1225936 B.C. Ltd. (100%). Settlement trust funds of $11,085,194 excluded from statements as held by Royal Trust for members. Total revenue of $24,784,826 includes $4,163,219 GBE income; government transfers calculated as ISC $5,728,492 + CMHC $12,549 + Gov of Canada $1,392,873 + FNHA $1,412,270 + Province of BC $4,221,173 + BC Hydro $489,716 + BC First Nations Gaming $550,994 + NENAS $28,407 + BC Oil and Gas Commission $723,520 = $14,559,994. Honoraria of $1,115,590 is unusually high compared to prior year $134,811. Budget was prepared on modified accrual basis, not comparable to PSAB actuals.
